name: Mad SEO Manager
description: The elite autonomous SEO Manager for OpenClaw. Unified site-wide auditing, editorial planning, and GSC/GA4 performance intelligence optimized for GEO and HCU.
author: mazgalesc

dependencies.note: Delegates GSC/GA4 access to api-gateway; requires scrapling-official for resilient research.
